com.hyperxtalk.library.test.title: hxtpm Test Library
com.hyperxtalk.library.test.description: Minimal test library for verifying the hxtpm package manager install pipeline. Call hxtpmTestPing() after install to confirm the library is live.
com.hyperxtalk.library.test.author: HyperXTalk

com.hyperxtalk.macosfingerprint.title: macOS Fingerprint Authentication
com.hyperxtalk.macosfingerprint.description: Native LCE library providing Touch ID and passcode authentication on macOS via the Local Authentication framework. Exposes macBiometricAuthIsAvailable(), macAuthenticateWithBiometrics(pReason), and macAuthenticateWithPasscode(pReason).
com.hyperxtalk.macosfingerprint.author: HyperXTalk

com.hyperxtalk.spriteengine.title: Sprite Engine
com.hyperxtalk.spriteengine.description: Sprite engine to build side scrolling games.
com.hyperxtalk.spriteengine.author: HyperXTalk

community.ferruslogic.plugin.devguides.title: DevGuides
community.ferruslogic.plugin.devguides.description: LiveCode IDE plugin that shows smart alignment guides and pixel distances while moving or resizing controls, making it easy to design well-spaced, aligned interfaces.
community.ferruslogic.plugin.devguides.author: FerrusLogic Team

org.openxtalk.library.fsevents.title: macOS FSEvents
org.openxtalk.library.fsevents.description: Native LCE library wrapping the macOS FSEvents API to provide real-time filesystem monitoring. Dispatches messages such as fseventsFileCreated, fseventsFileModified, and fseventsFileDeleted up the message hierarchy as events occur.
org.openxtalk.library.fsevents.author: emily-elizabeth
